stemHtml: When planning a flight from France to Italy, which passes through the Swiss airspace, what must be considered regarding compliance?

options.a: You need only comply with EASA regulations as all are EU member states.
options.b: You must comply with French, Swiss, and Italian regulations where applicable.
options.c: Swiss regulations don't apply to overflight if you're not landing there.
options.d: EASA Basic Regulation harmonizes all procedures, so no state-specific compliance needed.
